data.description:
## Description

**What**: Embed a completeness attestation sub-step inside the existing brainstorm Phase 1 Gate exit condition so the gate structurally enforces completeness before returning "passed".

**Why**: SC1 requires the Phase 1 Gate to be a structural forcing function — not advisory prose — that prevents bypassing scrutiny via self-attestation (the 3dae-af1a failure mode).

**Scope**:
- IN: Modify brainstorm Phase 1 Gate to require attestation field (exhausted | open) before gate can return passed; define exhausted state (all questions resolved with blocking_for answered) and open state (list of unresolved questions with blocking_for fields); META_QUESTION signal emission when blocking_for resolves to brainstorm itself (NOT REPLAN_ESCALATE); write PRECONDITIONS decisions_log entry on gate exit with affects_fields including workflow_completion_checklist
- OUT: Changes to other brainstorm phases; changes to dso:red-team-reviewer (S3); dogfooding validation (S5)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, a brainstorm Phase 1 Gate invocation that would previously have passed now fails (returns a non-passing signal) if it lacks an attestation field
  ← Satisfies: "Phase 1 Gate cannot return passed without an attestation field of value exhausted or open" (SC1)
- When this story is complete, when blocking_for resolves to brainstorm itself, an explicit META_QUESTION signal is emitted instead of REPLAN_ESCALATE
  ← Satisfies: "If blocking_for resolves to brainstorm itself (meta-question), escalate to user via explicit META_QUESTION signal — do NOT REPLAN_ESCALATE" (SC1)
- When this story is complete, the attestation field name and its allowed values (exhausted | open) are documented in a contract file (or a named section of the existing decision-id-format.md or a sibling contract); the brainstorm Phase 1 Gate writes its decisions_log entry with affects_fields explicitly including workflow_completion_checklist so the S3 tiered sampler routes it to 100% review
  ← Satisfies: "Phase 1 Gate completeness attestation" (SC1) AND enables SC2 high-stakes routing
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Testing] Brainstorm skill modifications need tests that verify gate exit behavior (pass vs. fail) without running a full brainstorm session — mock-compatible gate interface needed
- [Maintainability] No story in the map currently owns the affects_fields tagging convention for the PRECONDITIONS decisions_log entry; this story must explicitly tag workflow_completion_checklist or S3's tiered sampler will drop these attestations into the 20% rationale-only bucket (blue team finding — implicit shared state with S3)

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
data.title: As a planning workflow author, the brainstorm Phase 1 Gate structurally enforces completeness attestation so scrutiny bypasses via self-attestation are impossible
